title: Custom Wardrobes — Mosman
summary: Floor-to-ceiling wardrobe joinery in Mosman planned to suit the room footprint and everyday storage needs.
heroAlt: Mosman floor-to-ceiling wardrobes with integrated storage
overview: This Mosman wardrobe project is a good example of joinery that needs to feel built into the architecture of the room rather than added after the fact. The brief centred on cleaner vertical lines, better internal storage and a finish that would sit quietly within the bedroom.
materials: Lower North Shore home fitout detailing

afterImages.caption: Completed Mosman wardrobes designed to sit flush within the room and maximise built-in storage.

afterImages.alt: Mosman wardrobe shelving and display storage
afterImages.caption: Shelving and display storage detail from the Mosman wardrobe fitout.
Full-height wardrobe joinery in Mosman with contrasting dark internals and lighter outer panels.
Completed wardrobe wall in Mosman with oak-look panels and open shelving.

afterImages.alt: Mosman built-in wardrobe with hanging section
afterImages.caption: Built-in wardrobe in Mosman showing the hanging section and integrated storage.

afterImages.alt: Mosman wardrobe panel and overhead storage detail
afterImages.caption: Panel and overhead storage detail from the Mosman wardrobe project.

spaces.title: Wardrobes
spaces.text: Floor-to-ceiling wardrobes planned to feel integrated with the room, with cleaner lines and more usable internal storage.

outcome: The wardrobes read as part of the room instead of freestanding furniture, giving the space a cleaner built-in feel and more useful storage volume.
ctaText: If you are planning custom wardrobes in Mosman, send through your measurements or room photos and we can help map out the joinery scope.
